Motion: Vacate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-05-2020 Off Calendar

Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment And Dismiss Case With Prejudice; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE CADDIS FUNDING, LLC's Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment And Dismiss Case With Prejudice: Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the assignee is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
